ksa_text: Skill in diagnosing and resolving ML infrastructure failures, including training job crashes, serving latency spikes, resource contention across shared clusters, and data pipeline breakdowns that affect model inputs.

dcwf.top_element_label: Identify and implement tooling for controlling the steps in a continuous integration (CI) and continuous deployment (CD) pipeline.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Identify and implement tooling for controlling the steps in a continuous integration (CI) and continuous deployment (CD) pipeline.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-016 (AI, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4164 is insufficient to establish relevance to self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.416, dcwf=0.416, nice=0.409) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4164 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-S-016 (composite 0.4164) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4164 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Citizen Data Scientist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4164 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4164, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
